comment: Example proxy configuration for model tier routing. Adapt to your provider.

claude-haiku-4-5-20251001.comment: Haiku tier: fast, cheap, for read-only agents (Explorer, Doc Writer)

claude-sonnet-4-6.comment: Sonnet tier: balanced, for implementation agents (Backend/Frontend/Test/DevOps)

claude-opus-4-6.comment: Opus tier: deep thinking, for review agents (Spec Driver, PO, Code/Security Review)
